Frontend perf bake-off — runs

Each row is the median of N runs (the first run of every batch is dropped as a warm-up). Stat cells show median (min–max).

  • ★ Network quiet is the primary ranking metric — navigation start until the data layer stops fetching. Rank on the headline (content-based) columns.
  • Do NOT rank on load or LCP. For an SPA the load event fires long before the data the user came for has arrived, and LCP is often blank (—) because the largest content is a client-rendered table injected after first interaction. Blank LCP is expected, not an error.
  • Only compare rows with a similar data-item count, CPU× and network preset — a 0-row baseline and a 2000-row page are not comparable.
  • Newest rows are at the bottom.
  • Transfer dec. (KB) is uncompressed. The measurement server (vite preview) serves with no gzip/brotli, so this column is raw decoded bytes, not real wire size. Behind a compressing server/CDN the text assets (JS+CSS+HTML) roughly halve.
Run contextHeadlineNetworkReferenceMemoryWeightNotes
UTC timeScenarioBranchCommitCPUCoresOSChromeCPU×NetCacheData itemsRuns (N)CollectorData rendered (ms)Network quiet (ms) ★Data reqsSlowest req (ms)TTFB (ms)FCP (ms)load (ms)CLSLCP (ms)JS heap (MB)Heap snapshot (MB)DOM nodesRequestsTransfer dec. (KB)Notes
2026-07-01T00:04:57Zstocktake-detail-baselinemain556c767Apple M3 Pro11macOS 26.5.1149.0.0.06×nonewarm04 of 51.0.082 (73–98)79 (71–94)116 (14–19)4104690.021281.71.131446.1prod build (vite preview :4173), GraphQL proxied to OMS :8000, empty baseline table (0 rows), warm-up dropped
2026-07-01T00:35:16Zstocktake-detail-baselinemain045bd12Apple M3 Pro11macOS 26.5.1149.0.0.06×nonewarm15064 of 51.0.0556 (473–589)479 (448–510)1372 (354–395)31421080.021036517.9226304680.8prod build (vite preview :4173), GraphQL proxied to OMS :8000; FIRST populated baseline — full 1506-line table via single stocktake+preferences query (1 request); 14 of 17 cols (Doses Per Unit/Doses Counted/Donor hidden by store prefs); uncommitted lines-table feature on base 045bd12; warm-up dropped. NOT comparable to the earlier 0-row baseline.
2026-07-01T01:41:39Zstocktake-detail-baselinemain116b5d3Apple M3 Pro11macOS 26.5.1149.0.0.06×nonewarm15064 of 51.0.0505 (500–601)432 (426–517)1331 (325–398)313210708603.416.8226334679.8prod build (vite preview :4173), GraphQL proxied to OMS :8000; WITH client-side filter (roadmap step 3, row-toggle strategy) + mSupply design tokens; 1506-line table, 14 of 17 cols (3 gated by store prefs); single stocktake+preferences query (1 request); warm-up dropped. Load path unchanged vs the prior 1506-row baseline (filtering is client-side) — confirms no load regression.
2026-07-01T02:01:11Zstocktake-detail-baselinemain264478dApple M3 Pro11macOS 26.5.1149.0.0.06×nonewarm15064 of 51.0.0608 (534–682)508 (436–566)1347 (328–431)4150130010001.216.8226334681.8prod build (vite preview :4173), GraphQL proxied to OMS :8000; responsive table→card layout <600px (mSupply UI standard) — renderer stamps data-card/data-label on ~10 of 17 cols + one CSS @media block; uncommitted on base 264478d. 1506-line table, 14 of 17 cols (3 gated by store prefs), single stocktake+preferences query (1 request); warm-up dropped. Desktop load path effectively unchanged vs prior 116b5d3 baseline: transfer +2KB (681.8 vs 679.8), DOM/heap/requests identical; the ~+76ms median is within run-to-run noise (this batch net-quiet 436–566 vs prior 426–517), no structural cause.
2026-07-01T03:38:53Zstocktake-detail-baselinemain6cce610Apple M3 Pro11macOS 26.5.1149.0.0.06×nonewarm15064 of 51.0.0565 (536–590)453 (425–474)1333 (324–334)4148124010902.223226474669.2prod build (vite preview :4173), GraphQL proxied to OMS :8000; WITH sorting + typed-kind column model + table standards (design Increment 2) on top of filter; default sort = none so load path is unchanged; 1506-line table, 14 of 17 cols (3 pref-gated); single query (1 request). Uncommitted feature on base 6cce610. domNodes +14 vs pre-sort (one <button> per sortable header). Load metrics flat vs prior 1506-row baselines — no regression from sort/standards.
2026-07-01T03:51:26Zstocktake-detail-baselinemainb56be87Apple M3 Pro11macOS 26.5.1149.0.0.06×nonewarm15064 of 51.0.0560 (535–604)450 (423–478)1330 (323–381)3132112010422.122.6226474669.2prod build (vite preview :4173), OMS :8000; fully-optimized HEAD b56be87 = sorting + typed-kind + table standards ON TOP OF 3f768c6 bundle opt (favicon dropped, build-time GraphQL printing / no runtime graphql, JS ~14KB gz 4.9KB). Re-measured per request to include the bundle opt. Headline time-to-network-quiet ~449ms — statistically identical to the pre-opt 6cce610 row (453ms): the headline is data-fetch-bound (~330ms slowest /graphql; ~600KB data payload dominates transferKB 669), so the ~14KB JS + favicon opt is (correctly) invisible here — it helps parse/FCP marginally, not the data-bound headline. 1 request, default sort=none.
2026-07-01T04:17:56Zstocktake-detail-baselinemain220bb36Apple M3 Pro11macOS 26.5.1149.0.0.06×nonewarm15064 of 51.0.0562 (530–596)448 (422–481)1329 (322–368)3138112010743.122.6226474670.3prod build (vite preview :4173), OMS :8000; step 4 = filter+sort in URL (?search/?sort/?dir via replaceState) + filter-input styling. WORKING TREE on base 220bb36 (step-4 changes uncommitted at measure time). Baseline path has no query params, so the mount-read does no filter/sort apply — expected flat, confirmed: time-to-network-quiet ~447ms median vs ~450ms pre-step-4 (b56be87). 1 request; transfer 670.3KB (+~1KB for url.ts/CSS). No load regression from URL params or input styling.
2026-07-01T05:38:48Zstocktake-detail-baselinemaina648b0dApple M3 Pro11macOS 26.5.1149.0.0.06×nonewarm15064 of 51.0.0568 (545–622)446 (424–501)1321 (317–339)3152129011102.225.7256624674.9prod build (vite preview :4173), OMS :8000; step 5 = row selection + delete. Reference stocktake is NEW/editable, so the load now renders the checkbox column: domNodes 22647 -> 25662 (+~3015 = ~1506 checkboxes + select column), transfer 670.3 -> 674.9KB. Despite +3k nodes, time-to-network-quiet ~446ms median (vs ~450 pre-step-5) and time-to-data-rendered flat within noise — the headline is data-fetch-bound, so the extra DOM doesn't move it. 1 request, no regression.
2026-07-01T06:49:41Zstocktake-list-paginatedmain63aa0b7Apple M3 Pro11macOS 26.5.1149.0.0.06×nonewarm204 of 51.0.080 (67–116)74 (60–108)114 (11–17)390700.291082.11.8183427.8prod build (vite preview :4173), GraphQL proxied to OMS :8000; NEW paginated stocktake LIST — server-side pagination (20 rows/page), sort + filter hit the API, state persisted in URL params. First list-page baseline; NOT comparable to the detail-page rows (different page, 20 vs 1506 rows, one stocktakes query). Warm-up dropped. CLS 0.29 comes from the Loading→table swap (no reserved height).
2026-07-01T07:23:35Zstocktake-detail-baselinemain9cb4830Apple M3 Pro11macOS 26.5.1149.0.0.06×nonewarm15064 of 51.0.0562 (542–599)440 (423–479)1321 (316–355)3146122011122.225.8256624684.7prod build (vite preview :4173), OMS :8000; step 6 = edit-line modal + in-place row update. The modal is created on-demand (row click), so it adds NOTHING to the initial load: domNodes 25662 unchanged vs step 5; transfer 674.9->684.7KB (~10KB more JS for modal/mutation). time-to-network-quiet ~440ms median vs ~446 (step 5) — flat, data-fetch-bound. 1 request, no regression.
